CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Continued To Aug-28-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Mele T.A. Afuhaamango Sinapopo.
Dept. 514. Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Rodney M. Sweet, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Kerry B. Britton, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Mele T.A. Afuhaamango Sinapopo.
Plaintiff's complaint for Money-Sold Out and Junior Lien was filed on October 4, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Mele T.A. Afuhaamango Sinapopo on October 8, 2018, and was effectuated on October 19, 2018.
Default as to defendant Mele T.A. Afuhaamango Sinapopo was entered on November 21, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 21, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Kerry B. Britton, and against the defaulted defendant Mele T.A. Afuhaamango Sianpopo, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $41,622.28.
Attorney Fees - $4,000.00.
Costs - $677.00.

Total - $81,299.28.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
